text:
Once upon a time there was a curious cat named Felix. Felix wasn’t your typical cat. Every morning, after catching his own reflection in the glass mirror that hung on the wall, he’d saunter around the house, exploring every nook and cranny.

One particular morning, Felix heard a strange sound coming from the basement. Something metallic clapped softly as he crept closer. His curiosity piqued. He discovered an old metal pan sitting on a pile of dust, oddly illuminated by the slatted ceiling lamp.

With the stealth of a shadow, Felix picked up the pan. He had always admired how it gleamed—a curious artifact with scratches here and there. As he held it close, a tiny door opened beside the pan. A soft light shone out, revealing a tiny mouse-like person with big eyes.

Startled, Felix dropped the pan. The little figure bounced out just as Felix caught his reflection on the pan. They stared at each other.

“Meow?”
